assertions.assertion: Response includes updating the .NET target framework as one of the first steps
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Migration Checklist lists 'Update .NET target framework to net10.0' as an early step

assertions.assertion: Response includes replacing IdentityServer4 NuGet packages with Duende equivalents
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Migration Checklist includes 'Replace NuGet packages — IdentityServer4.* to Duende.IdentityServer.*'

assertions.assertion: Response includes updating namespaces from IdentityServer4 to Duende.IdentityServer
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Migration Checklist includes 'Update all namespaces'

assertions.assertion: Response includes creating and applying EF Core database migrations for both ConfigurationDbContext and PersistedGrantDbContext
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Migration Checklist includes 'Create and apply database migrations for both ConfigurationDbContext and PersistedGrantDbContext'

assertions.assertion: Response includes configuring a license key for Duende IdentityServer
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Migration Checklist includes 'Configure license key via configuration/secret manager'

assertions.assertion: Response includes verifying the deployment (e.g., checking discovery document, testing token issuance)
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Migration Checklist includes 'Verify discovery document' and 'Test token issuance and validation end-to-end'
